steps.title: Translate the product
steps.content:
The number that is $6$ less than $x$ is $x-6$, so the condition is
$$
x(x-6)=16
$$

steps.title: Factor the equation
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor:
$$
x^2-6x-16=0
$$
$$
(x-8)(x+2)=0
$$

steps.title: Use the positive value
steps.content: The two possible values are $8$ and $-2$, but the question says $x$ is positive. The answer is B.
